# Feature Change

## Summary
Describe the feature or enhancement in 1 to 3 sentences.

## What Changed
- Main user-facing change:
- Main implementation detail:

## Testing
- What should reviewers verify?

## Checklist
- [ ] I described the feature clearly.
- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the intended behavior.
- [ ] I updated documentation if the feature changes how the project is used.

## Optional Context
Add screenshots, examples, design notes, or anything else that helps reviewers understand the change.
